examples:
Command Example

!taxii2-reset-fetch-indicators

Fetch was reset successfully. Your next indicator fetch will collect indicators from the configured "First Fetch Time"

Fetch was reset successfully. Your next indicator fetch will collect indicators from the configured "First Fetch Time"
